rows.label: tev010701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Camber about Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Camber if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0001
rows.name:
What's that, newbie? You wanna
pilot a Doll? Ha! I'm guessing
you don't have a license.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you want to pilot a Doll, you'll
need to get yourself a license by
passing the license test.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0003
rows.name:
That test would be a lot to handle for
a tenderfoot like yourself. Fact is, I
doubt they'd even let you take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0004
rows.name:
But if you can make a name for yourself
out there, Commander Vandham himself will
invite you to take it sooner or later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0005
rows.name:
For now, don't even worry about Dolls.
Just focus on completing those missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Me? I'm obsessed with Dolls—and
there's no shortage of BLADEs
who feel the same way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0011
rows.name:
But the biggest Doll fan is probably
that one girl in the Arms Union. She's
100 percent insane about 'em![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0012
rows.name:
When we go out to dinner together,
she spends so much time talking about
Dolls that she forgets to eat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0013
rows.name:
We got caught up in Doll talk at the diner the other
night and totally lost track of time. Before I knew
it, I could see the sunrise outside the window.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0014
rows.name:
If that sounds like your kind of night, head on down
to the Arms test hangar, look for a young woman staring
intently at a Doll, and strike up a conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you want to pilot a Doll, you'll need to
complete grueling tasks assigned by Commander
Vandham in order to earn your Doll license.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0025
rows.name:
My license test was backbreaking. I
had a big list of indigens to kill
and precious resources to gather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I very nearly killed myself trying
to bring down a Overed, and that
was just ONE of my tasks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0027
rows.name:
At the time, I hated Commander Vandham
for putting me through that hell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0028
rows.name:
But I'm still using the things I learned in
that test. Hell, I doubt I'd be alive today if
I hadn't had to toughen myself up like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0043
rows.name: Light-type Dolls excel at evasion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0044
rows.name:
A lot of people prioritize armor, so light-type
models tend to get overlooked. But who needs
armor if your enemies can't land a hit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0045
rows.name:
An evasive fighting style can
also reduce the odds of your
Doll being destroyed in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0046
rows.name:
Don't get me wrong—I have a lot of respect for
the resilience of the heavy-type Dolls. It's
really just a matter of personal preference.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0060
rows.name:
Everyone in the hangars is
obsessively tinkering with those
new flight-module-equipped Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0061
rows.name:
And I'm certainly no exception. Their invention
has sent me back to the drawing board to radically
rethink the way we arm flight-capable Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0062
rows.name:
I'm barely getting any sleep! I can't
stop thinking about what the optimal
weapons system would be for a flying Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0063
rows.name:
The more I consider it, the more infinite the possibilities
seem. There are so many cool things we could do! How am
I supposed to push that aside and just sleep?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Camber about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0064
rows.name:
I heard the whole story from Mika. I am
so sorry for what she put you through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0065
rows.name:
I just don't understand why she
would do something like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0066
rows.name:
But she was a member of our team, so if
there's anything we can do to make this
right, just tell us. We'll do whatever we can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0068
rows.name:
For the millionth time, I'll
be fine! Mika's let me take
her Doll out loads of times![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0069
rows.name:
Yeah, but if you mess
this up, you could die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0072
rows.name:
I told you I'm not gonna mess up,
so stop worrying! You need to be
looking after Mika now anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Camber about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0073
rows.name: Hey, thanks for saving me back there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0074
rows.name:
As for the Doll, Axena has it back
in perfect working order, and it's
ready to return to service.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0075
rows.name:
She's been a big help around here.
I ought to buy her dinner one of
these days to say thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0077
rows.name:
That's sweet and all, Camber,
but I'd be happier if you treated
me to some Doll components.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0080
rows.name:
In fact, they just released some new
ones that I've had my eye on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0083
rows.name:
Ha! I should have guessed you'd rather
starve than neglect your Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0086
rows.name:
Hmmm... Actually, if I really want to thank
Axena, I should probably just buy her a new
Doll component. I bet she'd like that better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_MSG0087
rows.name:
Yeah, I'm pretty sure she'd rather
starve than neglect her Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Camber about light-type Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010701_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Camber about the Doll flight module.[ST:wait ]
